text:
is a first year student at Attack Junior High School.

Appearance

Mina is a young girl with short black hair tied in pigtails. She has large black eyes.

Personality

She is a half shy girl, Mina is a sweet and kind girl towards her friends and classmates, and as such she appears to have quite a lot of friends.

Story

Mina appears being shown that she entered a sports club, later she would appear in the class secondarily, until the directors and teachers of Junior High begin to get strict, she along with Hannah start complaining about it, then later see Sasha jump in front of them and almost knocking over the schoolchild.

She is later present as Connie announced he was accepted into Attack High School.
